shortDescription: Fully balanced all-natural wet dog food with lamb protein. Carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult dogs.
description: Proline Adult Dog Food Canned - Lamb Chunks in Gravy (Pack of 20) , fully balanced all-natural dog food with lamb protein. Carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult dogs. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein .............................. 6.5% Fat .................................. 3.5% Crude Ash..............................2% Crude Cellulose (Fiber) ............... 0.3% Moisture .............................82% INGREDIENTS: Meat and animal derivatives (4% lamb), cereals, minerals, vegetable by-products, sugar. MINERALS: Zinc, Manganese, Copper. VITAMINS: Vit. D3, Vit. E.
